subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who is the Object of the world's desire, Who, through His Most Great Name, hath enabled the hearts and souls of His chosen ones to attain true unity and spiritual love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم را که باسم اعظم افئده و قلوب اولیا را بتالیف حقیقی و محبت معنوی فائز
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
